'''Platform 429''' was a landing platform on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. [[Tag Greenley/Legends|Tag Greenley]] and [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]] landed the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']] there after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]]
